lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Fade in. A government building sits by the ocean. A boat approaches the dock.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Oh, hello. I'm sorry. Welcome. I didn't hear you come in.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: My name is Ara Hernandez.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Are you just arriving from Breeder's Island or are you a foreigner from the land of London?

choices.text: Yeah. I just came from Breeder's Island.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Please sit down.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Okay, all set. You're assigned to the city of West Ward.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: To be honest. I don't know much about West Ward.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: But they're known for their coal mining. And their parties. You didn't hear that from me.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Also don't lose your discipline while you're there.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Let me give you a tour of Weston.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Weston is over 1,100 years old. That's a lot of history. We became one of the strongest countries in the world over 500 years ago.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Then the Great Xiao-Zunich War happened. It lasted over 10 years. It was a dark time in our history.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: But now we made our government system for the benefit of the people. And people are happy.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Oh, But for you, you will start off here — The Lottery Convention!!!

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: In a couple of years, when you turn 25, you get to enter the Lottery Convention.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: You will go to the Grand Lottery Convention Hall in the capital city of Draco.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Depending on your status, you can find a higher-level mate or a lower-level mate for you.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: But remember — mating or intimate relationships before marriage is illegal and punishable.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Breeder Island-born Westenites and Mainland-born Westenites on the mainland are all seen as the same.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: We have to protect each other to make sure our society survives.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Because without unity there is no future.

lines.speaker: Ara Hernandez
lines.text: Oh. Nothing.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: END OF PROLOGUE PART 1
